title: Changes to veterinary medicine supply in Northern Ireland webinar recordings
body: "Watch VMD and DAERA officials explain the upcoming changes that will affect Northern Ireland based vets, wholesalers and retailers from 1 January 2026.  Upcoming changes to the supply of veterinary medicines for wholesalers and retailers in Northern Ireland  Watch the recording of our first webinar which covered:   Changes affecting wholesalers, retailers and end users How to identify veterinary medicines authorised for Northern Ireland Examples of how suppliers and end users will be affected Compliance with upcoming changes to EU rules   Changes to the supply of veterinary medicines for wholesalers and retailers in Northern Ireland  Upcoming changes to the supply of veterinary medicines for veterinary surgeons in Northern Ireland  Watch the recording of the second webinar which covered:   Changes affecting veterinary surgeons based in Northern Ireland The Veterinary Medicines Health Situation Scheme The Veterinary Medicines Internal Market Scheme Changes to the prescribing cascade Compliance with upcoming changes to EU rules   Changes to the supply of veterinary medicines for veterinary surgeons in Northern Ireland "
